name: mothers-little-executive-assistant
description: Unify every source of 'things I need to do' into a single tracked backlog on GitHub Projects.
author: queen-of-code

commands.name: configure-mlea
commands.description: First-time setup: connect Gmail accounts, GitHub repo, and scheduling

commands.name: add-task
commands.description: Add a task manually from natural language

commands.name: my-day
commands.description: Generate a daily briefing of open tasks

commands.name: mlea-status
commands.description: Show health check and scan statistics

scheduledTasks.name: mlea-email-scan
scheduledTasks.description: Incremental email scan across all configured mailboxes

scheduledTasks.name: mlea-daily-maintenance
scheduledTasks.description: Recurring task renewal, overdue detection, ledger pruning
